creator: ddg01nb@duck.com
text: I think we can close the issue now. I just realized I was hit by a rare situation that some of the fontconfig cache are actually corrupted along with some font combinations on my system. I remove and reinstall all the Noto fonts  and remove some CJK fonts then Emacs works normally, particulary the view-hello-file page,  again.  Some fonts, such as zh-CJKUnifont and zh-CNS11643-font can cause similar problem on my system, too. I will stick with Noto font only for the time being.
